title: Warm Italian Sauce
excerpt: WARM ITALIAN SAUCE Ingredients 30 ml olive oil 1 onion, diced 15 ml finely chopped garlic (or to taste) 5 – 10 ml (or to taste) dried red chilli flakes 400 g brown mushrooms, chopped into smaller pieces or sliced salt and pepper to taste 1 x 410 …
html:
WARM ITALIAN SAUCE

Ingredients

30 ml olive oil

1 onion, diced

15 ml finely chopped garlic (or to taste)

5 – 10 ml (or to taste) dried red chilli flakes

400 g brown mushrooms, chopped into smaller pieces or sliced

salt and pepper to taste

1 x 410 g tin whole tomatoes, chopped smaller or crushed

1 x 410 g tin tomato puree

15 ml plain vinegar (to taste, to bring out the flavours)

sugar to taste

45 ml prepared basil pesto or a handful of roughly torn basil leaves

 

METHOD

  1. Heat the oil in a pot and fry the onion lightly.
  2. Add the garlic and chilli flakes and fry until fragrant.
  3. Add the mushrooms and fry until done.
  4. Season with salt and pepper and stir in the tinned tomatoes, tomato puree and vinegar.
  5. Season to taste with the sugar and bring to the boil. Lower the heat and simmer for half an hour or longer, until your sauce is deep red and delicious.
  6. Stir in the pesto or basil leaves and serve.
